title: Remotely
description: The Minecraft IDE - Server Management | File Explorer/Editor | Resource Browser | SSH Support | Port Forwarding / Reverse Proxy | Server Map Viewer | Backup Manager | Java Manager
body:
![Desktop Mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc5c41d4f0643337de48e0694208882ecfe5c1fc.png)
# <center>Remotely - The Minecraft IDE</center>

Remotely is a **Client-Side** Minecraft Powertool for Minecraft servers and developers.
Want to create a server? Sure! Want to create a modpack server? Also no problem!
It's built using ReScreen, a custom UI framework that enables max productivity while looking awesome.

### Features:
- Server Managment, Creation (Custom, Modpacks, or Import), And Configuration.
- Full Featured Terminal (Tab Completion, Colors, Optmizied Renderer)
- Built-In Reverse Proxy For **Port Forwarding**, Free, And Re-Routable.
- Zero Friction: Copy/Paste/Cut From And To Local, SSH, Reactor Servers, Open Any Remote File Locally (Yes, You Can Use NBT Explorer)
- Server Player Management (Players List, OPs, Bans, Kick, And Custom Actions)
- Mods/Plugins Management/Browser From Modrinth/CurseForge/Spigot/Hangar, Downloads, Auto-Update, Backups, And More!
- MSMP Support: Edit Server Settings And Gamerules IN REAL TIME Without Restarting!
- Full File Explorer, And File Editor.
- Smart Backup Manager.
- Java JRE Manager And Downloader.
- World Map Renderer For Your Server (Chunkbase-Like Structure Estimation Planned!)
- Feedback Tracker (Bugs, And Suggestions)
- Powerful Themeing Engine
- Remotely Support Remote SSH Servers (Duh), Yet you **only need the client-side mod**!
- Multi-Tabs Everywhere! Manage Servers/Terminals/Resources/Players, And Files Editors/Explorers At A Multi-Tabs Level. 
- Desktop Mode Available! Each screen can be a window that have multi-tabs and grouped tab views.
- Secure, Everything Is Saved Using OS-Level Keyrings.
- And WAAAAAY MORE, seriously, look for the details below!


<details>
<summary>Server Manager</summary>
  
### Server Creation:
![Creation Popup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/194b7dec17c0eabd8407a62ad2d61b6a3b46eb8c_0.webp)
- Create: Takes You to the configuration screen:
![Configuration Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/774d04f27006a096c102ee6abb1e9eed89fabcf1.png)
Here, you can configure a LOT of stuff, this screen is the same as the edit option.
- Features are for runtime server management, this inlcudes the server life cycle, player management, and gamerule/server.properties (MSMP), I recommend keeping all of them as true.

## Icon Customization
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6d02e0c9aad59a0430789d0436ae2de3296b1fe.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Server Details (Terminal)</summary>
  
![Server Details Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ae4782f701b1cbce8ae5a1994e0362e23f8192a.png)
Remotely has a multi-tab design that allows you to manage more than one server in one place.
The terminal is the main highlight, it's a full featured terminal, you can do whatever you want! including command input color highlight & tab completion.!

You can use it in local mode, basically a normal terminal, allowing you to open whatever CLI app you want, it was optmized for such tasks too!
![`ssh terminal.shop` example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f01c5563f7922ae081c2d484a5a982d2db553d36.png)
![sst/opencode example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db0bf11cd91778181d448c0f0d884e74a0d0b15f.png)

It also support selection, copy/paste, and mouse reporting.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Server Details (Resources)</summary>

## Resources

![Resource Container](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eebee74bb9640484c84fbdff369b8353a7627ca4.png)
Here, you can manage your plugins/mode:
- Group resources together.
- Update one resource
- Update all resources
- Double-Click to view reosurce
- Filters & Sort options.
![More Resource Container Options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90ebd6d339a9b0624e9e1152e22d97d8c1012755.png)
![Single Resource Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fb083124f74512314a044307b447242d15f6dee.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Server Details (Player Management)</summary>

### In Game Player Management
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cd48bd60562ed768b8ce829b19a77bfaad0d0d0.png)
You can view offline players, banned players, and OPed players

Most importantly, are actions! You can ban, unban, kick, op, and create your own custom stuff!
![actions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b32fce74fda744e64f6785c7af7ca91ad6a5956f.png)

### Custom Actions Example:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02d40849d22008f151fb8c3d06a93e85ffdc2cd6.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4d858df8aa94fef2233a47b542a8ac05d8e5467.png)
</details>




<details>
<summary>Resource Browsing</summary>

## Resource Browser
![ResourceBrowserScreen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/451eb643f8b80ad1def820630ea761dd587bb366.png)
Beautiful and compact resource browser that has some hiddle features, like **already installed resources and the one that needs update**
You can `shift+click` to:
- Install a new resource
- Update an installed resource

## Resource Overview
![ResourceOverviewScreen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce6dc7be61869e2a40eac2a81a3efb13ab52533f.png)


![Gallery Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be2e249d73b90cda14d934c4e29a801e9ce02ba8.png)
You can browse the gallery, zoom, pan, and copy images!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbca691e7f81902b40c661dae9550c19c853cb12.png)![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/848d7f9d03799463d9b7d8c2cb5687505f6da067.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d67dfa63a690b11c94d40103444f9ac62fa353b.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>MSMP Support</summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29dd8fad498868f9747d8c316db7496f5e1c96c4.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a77e25b584de897554eec030b7df821d2f7e848c.png)

<details>
<summary>File Explorer</summary>
  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f67f69208b1bd0c155b18e4b6d8dd9474ec646f3.png)
Basically a file explorer, fast as hell, support sftp/local files, and you can copy/paste between **local and ssh**!


</details>


<details>
<summary>File Editor</summary>

## IDE-Like Workflow!
![Java Code Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aeb043d635626cf9f8a6d298898a89db933b3d7.png)

### Edit code with indent-friendly way, and manage everything in workspaces!
![Workspaces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51131522b8fcc4311652ed3146c4ed352fa03d2d.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Port Forwarding</summary>

### You can port forward any server with just 1 click!
![Reverse Proxy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18c7d7a6bd48e8ead6cfb88babf1110fe935d806.png)

You can customize the SSH reverse proxy host as you wish:
![Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/371ca461293f090c613c9bfd87d09e820d4ec848.png)

</details>

## <center>Remotely Is Also A Native App!</center>
Download the latest Windows `exe` or Crossplatform Java `jar` From [Here](https://restudiomc.net/remotely#versions)

There's Still Way More Stuff! I'm just not gonna make this a wiki :D
